[30;1m292 | [0m[35m```[0m
[30;1m293 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m294 | [0m[35m####Bubble Point (Bubble Line) Attributes[0m
[30;1m295 | [0m[35mA time series graph and uses bubble to represent a sample size happening a cross a series.[0m
[30;1m296 | [0m[35m```javascript[0m
[30;1m297 | [0m[35mvar bubblePoint = requrie('yako').bubble.point[0m
[30;1m298 | [0m[35mvar points = [{[0m
